dict.string: Copyright © 2026 Aarnav Koushik. All rights reserved.
auto-wifi reads nearby Wi-Fi networks so it can pick the best known one. macOS requires Location access to expose Wi-Fi network names.
auto-wifi reads nearby Wi-Fi networks to detect when a better known network is available. macOS gates Wi-Fi network names behind Location authorization.

auto-wifi monitors nearby Wi-Fi networks continuously — including in the background — so it can switch you to a better known network as conditions change. macOS gates Wi-Fi network names behind Location authorization.
